seo.title: Park 101 | Rooftop Bar & Restaurant in Carlsbad Village
seo.description: Multi-level rooftop bar and restaurant in Carlsbad Village, CA. BBQ, craft beer, cocktails, 20+ screens, game day headquarters — one block from the beach.

hero.eyebrow: Carlsbad Village · One Block From The Beach
hero.heading: PRK 101
hero.subheading: Rooftop Restaurant & Bar in Carlsbad Village
hero.body: Carlsbad's rooftop sports bar, BBQ, and game day headquarters — one block from the beach in Carlsbad Village.

venue.heading:
Rooftop.
Courtyard.
Indoor Bar.
venue.body: Three distinct spaces under one open sky. The central courtyard with the massive LED wall. The elevated rooftop deck with views of Carlsbad Village. The indoor bar with wall-to-wall screens and long communal tables. One block from the beach.

smokehouse.heading:
Smoked Low.
Served Right.
smokehouse.body: Brisket. Ribs. Pulled pork. All wood-smoked the right way. Served on a tray with pickles, bread, and sauce — the way it was meant to be eaten. No shortcuts, no compromises.

drinks.heading:
Cold Drinks.
Big Selection.
drinks.body: Signature cocktails, frozen margaritas, local craft beers on draft, and the Rodeo Tower — Park 101's most celebrated creation.

events.heading:
Live Music.
Every Week.
events.body: Country nights. Live bands. Padres watch parties. UFC fight nights. From kickoff to the final buzzer, from the first song to last call — something's always happening at Park 101.

brunch.heading: Brunch on the Rooftop
brunch.body: Open-air rooftop. Smoked brisket chilaquiles. Breakfast burritos loaded with tri-tip. Rodeo Tower mimosas. The best way to spend a Saturday morning in Carlsbad Village.

families.heading:
Bring the Crew.
Bring the Dog.
Bring the Kids.

privateEvents.heading:
Your Event.
Our Venue.
privateEvents.body: Birthday parties, corporate happy hours, game day buyouts, rehearsal dinners — Park 101's spaces are yours to fill. Book a section, the rooftop, the courtyard, or the whole place.
